speeches.name: Jerome H. Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: At the FOMC press conference, Powell said policy was left unchanged because the current stance remains appropriate, while warning that Middle East developments have increased uncertainty and that higher energy prices could raise inflation in the near term.

speeches.name: Jerome H. Powell
speeches.role: Chair, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
speeches.summary: In his January statement, Powell emphasized that the Fed was maintaining the target range for the federal funds rate and that policy remained focused on progress toward maximum employment and 2% inflation.
